signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC has resolved its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a regulatory overhang that had weighed on XRP for approximately half a decade.[1] This resolution has triggered a fundamental shift in market sentiment and represents the most significant catalyst for XRP's April 2026 rally.[1]

signals.headline: XRP Breaks Above $1
signals.raw:
XRP Breaks Above $1.50 Resistance for First Time in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP touched $1.50 on April 17, 2026, for the first time since early February, with an intraday high of $1.51094.[2] The token currently trades around $1.42-$1.43 after a pullback, but this breakthrough of a critical resistance level signals underlying strength rather than speculative excess.[1][2]

signals.headline: Rakuten Integrates XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Integrates XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**

On April 15, Rakuten Wallet launched XRP as both a listed asset and payment method, reaching 44 million Rakuten Pay users and 5 million merchant locations.[2] The platform's 3 trillion loyalty points ($23 billion in circulation) can now convert directly to XRP, representing a major enterprise adoption milestone.[2]
